systems.futureReadMode: backend-mediated read; prefer delta query and change notifications for sync candidates
systems.futureWriteMode: blocked until explicit Graph mutation gate
systems.auth: delegated first for user-context reads; app-only only for approved service scenarios with least privilege
systems.cache: allowed for metadata with TTL + source last-modified + delta token
systems.throttling: honor 429 Retry-After; exponential backoff; avoid frequent polling
systems.evidenceUse: files/list metadata/source URLs; PCC owns evidence link metadata only

systems.evidenceUse: RFIs, submittals, commitments, observations, punch, daily logs, change events as source-owned evidence
